description: Welcome to 39 Ahmadi Crescent, a meticulously maintained one-owner home in one of Bedford's most sought-after neighbourhoods near the Paper Mill Lake area. Situated on a quiet crescent surrounded by mature trees and established homes, this impressive five-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom residence offers exceptional space, comfort, and versatility. A welcoming covered front porch leads to a spacious foyer where vaulted ceilings and skylights fill the home with natural light. The main-level primary suite provides the convenience of one-level living and features a walk-in closet, ensuite bath, and a cozy sitting nook ideal for reading, relaxing, or watching TV. The kitchen offers quartz countertops, ample cabinetry, and a functional layout designed for family life and entertaining. All five bedrooms are generously sized, with most featuring walk-in closets. Premium hardwood flooring and quality finishes throughout add timeless appeal and warmth to the home. The extra-large basement provides outstanding flexibility, with space for a recreation room, home theatre, fitness area, teen retreat, or future in-law suite. A substantial lower-level family room offers even more room for gathering and entertaining. Recent updates include a new propane-fired boiler (2026), brand-new basement carpeting, updated ceramic tile flooring, and an architectural shingle roof installed in 2017 with a transferable warranty. Located close to excellent schools, parks, walking trails, shopping, restaurants, and major commuter routes, this exceptional property offers the perfect balance of privacy, convenience, and long-term value. A rare opportunity to own a spacious, beautifully maintained home in one of Bedford's most desirable communities.

subdistrict_name: Subdistrict F (Fairmount, Clayton Park, Rockingham)
name: 42 Lodge Drive
description: Welcome to 42 Lodge Drive, where the peace of country living meets the convenience of city life. Nestled on a quiet cul-de-sac in one of Halifax's most established family neighbourhoods, this beautifully maintained home offers a rare blend of privacy, nature, and accessibility. Just steps from Hemlock Ravine Park and the iconic Heart-Shaped Pond, you'll enjoy scenic walking trails and a tranquil setting, while remaining minutes from Bedford, Clayton Park, downtown Halifax, Highway 102, the McKay Bridge, shopping, recreation, and excellent schools including Grosvenor-Wentworth Park Elementary. Set on a mature landscaped lot, the private backyard features a spacious composite deck with aluminum and glass railings overlooking the treed surroundings and a built-in irrigation system. Inside, the bright kitchen offers white shaker cabinetry, quartz countertops, updated appliances, and a dining area with direct access to the deck. Large windows fill the living room with natural light, while the electric fireplace creates a warm focal point. A spacious main-floor family room provides exceptional flexibility and could be reconfigured to create additional bedrooms, while a beautifully updated full bath with in-floor radiant heat completes the level. Upstairs, you'll find three generous bedrooms including an oversized primary retreat with dual closets and potential for a future ensuite. The fully finished lower level adds valuable living space with a large rec room, third bathroom, laundry area, and direct access to the oversized built-in garage. Recent upgrades include three ductless heat pumps, a whole-home Generac propane generator, 200-amp electrical service, roof shingles replaced in 2019, and a hot water heater in 2023. Located in a neighbourhood known for its unique homes, mature lots, low traffic, and strong sense of community, 42 Lodge Drive offers a lifestyle that is becoming increasingly difficult to find in Halifax.
